principle: Observe permitted evidence. Recommend with evidence. Change the athlete's world only through a provider-permitted route and exact approval.

boundaries.reason: Reading athlete-authorized data is non-mutating. A browser read is eligible only through an enabled reviewed executor in an attended, provider-permitted session and must retain browser_read provenance.
The athlete explicitly submitted a local note. Saving it as evidence does not change the approved plan.
Analysis may run immediately, but uncertain portions and ingredients must be confirmed before logging.
Image-based nutrition values are estimates and become athlete data only after confirmation.
Training changes must be presented as a proposal with evidence, never silently applied.
The checked-in judge flow uses a Garmin-shaped simulation and still requires approval. No personal Garmin browser write is authorized by the current provider playbook.
No current provider playbook enables an attended write executor. A future executor requires provider permission plus an exact, expiring, one-use approval envelope; approval cannot create that route.
The harness provides wellness coaching, not diagnosis or treatment. Urgent symptoms require qualified care.
